threats.title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Finds Thousands of Zero-Day Flaws Across Major Systems
threats.summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) company Anthropic announced a new cybersecurity initiative called Project Glasswing that will use a preview version of its new frontier model, Claude Mythos, to find and address security vulnerabilities.
